name: Bug report
about: Report a harness failure that should have been caught
title: '[bug] '
labels: bug

---

## What happened?

Describe the failure. What was the agent trying to do?

## What should have happened?

What harness pattern would have prevented this?

## Failure class

Which RHO failure class does this belong to? (context_rot, stale_memory, tool_misuse, missing_verification, permission_boundary, model_hallucination, timeout, orchestration_error)

## Trajectory log excerpt

If available, include relevant log entries.
